title: Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary
tagline: Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Kerala

overview.short: Choolannur Pea Fowl Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary located in Chulanur village in Palakkad district of Kerala state, south India.
overview.description: Choolannur Pea Fowl Sanctuary is a bird sanctuary located in Chulanur village in Palakkad district of Kerala state, south India. The place where sanctuary is located is locally known as Mayiladumpara, which literally means "the rock where peacocks dance". As of 2022, it is the only peafowl sanctuary in Kerala.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Chulanur
topPlaces.description: Chulanur is a small village in Palakkad district of Kerala state, south India. Chulanur is famous for peacocks.

topPlaces.name: Peringottukurissi-I
topPlaces.description: Peringottukurissi-I is a village in the Palakkad district, state of Kerala, India. It is among the villages administered by the Peringottukurissi gram panchayat.

topPlaces.name: Tarur-I
topPlaces.description: Tarur-I is a village in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Mangottu Bhagavathi Temple
topPlaces.description: Mangottu Bhagavathi Temple is in Athipotta, 24 km from Palakkad via Alathur. The Hindu goddess of the temple, Mangottu Bhagavathi, is considered the younger sister of Parakkattu Bhagwathi who has a temple in Kavasseri near by.

topPlaces.name: Thiruvilwamala
topPlaces.description: Thiruvilwamala is a hilly village in the northern region of Thrissur district, in the state of Kerala, southern India. It is located 47 kilometres northeast of district headquarters Thrissur.

topPlaces.name: Vilwadrinatha Temple
topPlaces.description: The Vilwadrinatha Temple is a Hindu temple in Thiruvilwamala, a town in the city of Thrissur, Kerala, India. The principal deities are Rama, the seventh incarnation of the god Vishnu, and his brother, Lakshmana.

topPlaces.name: Mankara
topPlaces.description: Mankara is a village and gram panchayat in Palakkad district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Athipotta
topPlaces.description: Athipotta is a small village near Alathur in the Palakkad district of Kerala state, south India. It's about 30 km from Palakkad town and 10 km from Alathur.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (63 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (63 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Chulannur Peafowl Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Chulanur, Peringottukurissi-I, Tarur-I, Mangottu Bhagavathi Temple, Thiruvilwamala.
